full_text:
Heatwave hits Bhandara
Bhandara: The intensity of the sun is being felt more acutely, causing distress among citizens. Going outside during the afternoon has become difficult. Due to a significant rise in temperature, the effects of the heat are increasing. Currently, the intensity of the sun is growing day by day, and it is felt more strongly during the afternoon. In some areas, there is a possibility of further temperature increases. The heat is also affecting rural areas.
In this context, a severe heatwave is being witnessed in Bhandara. Reports indicate that temperatures are rising day by day. Citizens are distressed due to this heat, and there has been an increase in electricity demand. In light of this, coolers are now being used to keep transformers cool.
The oil in transformers heats up due to the high temperatures, which poses a risk of transformer burning. Therefore, to maintain a steady power supply and prevent power outages, coolers are being used to keep the transformers cool.
Short Summary
A severe heatwave in Bhandara; temperatures are rising day by day.
Citizens are distressed due to the heat.
Transformers are overheating due to increased electricity demand.
Coolers are being used on transformers to maintain a steady power supply.
